mnemonics.title: SMS Journey
mnemonics.content: Cats Sit Right After (Composition → Submission → Routing → Arrival) - Remember SMS workflow steps

mnemonics.title: LBS Triad
mnemonics.content: Great Navigation Systems (GPS → Network → Sensors) - Three location data sources in Android

mnemonics.title: Permission Trio
mnemonics.content: SRR - Send, Receive, Read (SEND_SMS → RECEIVE_SMS → READ_PHONE_STATE) - Core SMS permissions

mnemonics.title: Transaction Flow
mnemonics.content: BOC - Begin Operations Carefully (BeginTransaction → Operations → Commit/Rollback) - SQLite transaction steps

acronyms.usage: Remember location data sources for LBS

visualTips.visualization: Imagine SMS as a postcard: Your message (content), sender/receiver addresses (phone numbers), and postal service (mobile network)
Picture a treasure map: GPS = precise X mark, Network = city-level map, Sensors = compass directions
Visualize three keys: FINE (gold key), COARSE (silver key), BACKGROUND (rusty key) opening different map detail levels
See transactions as sandwiches: BEGIN and COMMIT as bread slices, database operations as fillings
Imagine a river: GPS/WiFi/Sensor streams merging into a location data lake used by your app

analogies.analogy: SMS is like mailing letters (external communication), SQLite is your filing cabinet (local data storage)
Think of LBS as a tour guide: Your app is the tourist, location services are the guide giving real-time directions
Location listeners are like weather reports - periodic updates (rain alerts) when conditions change (user moves)
